title: WebViews should not be vulnerable to cross-app scripting attacks
description: WebViews in Java applications must be protected against cross-app scripting attacks, which can allow malicious apps to inject or execute unauthorized scripts. Properly configure and secure WebViews to prevent exploitation and protect user data.
recommendation: Always validate and sanitize input to WebViews, disable JavaScript when not needed, and avoid loading content from untrusted sources. Regularly review WebView configurations for security best practices.

checks.message: Always validate and sanitize input to WebViews, disable JavaScript when not needed, and avoid loading content from untrusted sources. Regularly review WebView configurations for security best practices.
